reasoning: The control CM-8(1) focuses on maintaining an updated inventory of system components during installation and removal, which is a process-oriented control typically managed by cloud-specific services like SSM (System Manager) for patching and inventory management. Kubernetes does not inherently manage system component inventories in the same way as cloud providers do for their virtual machines or instances. Kubernetes focuses more on the orchestration and management of containerized applications rather than the underlying infrastructure inventory management.
